channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Forest fined almost $1M for questioning integrity of match officials in inflammatory post
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An inflammatory post that got more than 46 million views on social media has proven very costly for Premier League soccer team Nottingham Forest.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay Area News Group girls athlete of the week: Elsa Chin, Alameda flag football
item.description: Elsa Chin, a senior on the Alameda flag football team, filled up the stat sheet for the Hornets over the past week. She scored two rushing touchdowns and had two interceptions in a win over Arroyo and added three interceptions and two touchdowns in a win over Castro Valley.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Coach K discusses 'chaotic' state of college athletics as NIL runs rampant: 'Figure this out'
item.description: Mike Krzyzewski retired in 2022 and has seen NIL run rampant, but despite his decades in college sports, even he doesn't have a solution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rafael Nadal gave his all until he simply couldn’t anymore and had to retire: Analysis
item.description: Rafael Nadal’s tennis career will be remembered because of the numbers, yes — the 14 French Open trophies, the 22 Grand Slam titles overall, the nearly two decades in the top 10, and so on — and, without a doubt, because of his riveting rivalries with Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Lynx stun New York Liberty with 95-93 overtime win in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals
item.description: Napheesa Collier’s turnaround jumper with 8.8 seconds left lifted the Minnesota Lynx to a 95-93 win over the New York Liberty in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Blue Jackets captain Boone Jenner will miss most of the season after shoulder surgery
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Columbus Blue Jackets captain Boone Jenner is expected to miss most of the season after having shoulder surgery on Wednesday, the day before the team's season opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam tennis champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, WGN 9

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: What is Freddie Freeman's status for NLDS Game 3?
item.description: Perhaps the most understated but significant development in Sunday night’s emotionally charged National League Division Series game between San Diego and Los Angeles was the departure of Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres look to rebound in game 2 of NLDS against Dodgers
item.description: Photos: The San Diego Padres are facing off against the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 2 of the NL Division Series on Sunday, with Yu Darvish starting for the Padres.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4
